mk8_flip_key.summary: Verified foundation record for UK Fiesta Mk8 / CE1 with remote flip key.
verified_notes: Ford documents a remote flip-key configuration.
The key blade is used to start this configuration.
The vehicle uses Ford's Passive Anti-Theft System terminology.
warnings: Transponder, frequency, blade profile and aftermarket programming coverage remain unverified.
Do not use unverified values for ordering or programming a customer key.

mk8_passive_key.summary: Verified foundation record for UK Fiesta Mk8 / CE1 with passive key and push-button start.
verified_notes: The passive key contains a removable emergency blade.
The key must be inside the vehicle to switch on the ignition and start the engine.
The backup position is beneath a rubber mat and the key is placed buttons-up.
The backup position can be used when the key battery is flat or frequencies are jammed.
warnings: Transponder, frequency, blade profile and aftermarket programming coverage remain unverified.
Do not use unverified values for ordering or programming a customer key.

ford_fiesta_job_note_573f03c9e1.text: Core key-stock data is independently supported by Transpondery and UK supplier catalogues. Exact OEM part number varies by remote style and build.

ford_fiesta_job_note_b9b1cb64ef.text: Core key-stock data is independently supported by Transpondery and UK supplier catalogues. Exact OEM part number varies by remote style and build. Some key hardware varies within this year/build range. Confirm the original key, VIN and physical vehicle configuration before supply.

ford_fiesta_job_note_60a7bd00f4.text: Ford UK documents passive key, removable emergency blade and backup start. Exact OEM remote number and tool IDs remain to be mapped.

Some key hardware varies within this year/build range. Confirm the original key, VIN and physical vehicle configuration before supply.

ford_fiesta_job_note_be2cc58595.text: Ford UK documents the flip-key configuration. Core blade/frequency/chip family follows professional Mk8 application listings; exact OEM remote number and tool IDs still need mapping.

ford_fiesta_job_note_184e95721e.text: Ford UK documents the flip-key configuration. Core blade/frequency/chip family follows professional Mk8 application listings; exact OEM remote number and tool IDs still need mapping. Some key hardware varies within this year/build range. Confirm the original key, VIN and physical vehicle configuration before supply.

ford_fiesta_job_note_d5e827af26.text: The facelift remains on the Mk7 platform but uses the later DST80 security family. Exact OEM remote number varies by build.

ford_fiesta_job_note_2b9b1c19d9.text: Use FO21 and Texas 4D-63 40-bit for this UK Mk6 record. Do not also show the conflicting HU101 duplicate.

ford_fiesta_job_note_283f9150d3.text: Use only where push-button start is confirmed. Exact OEM part number varies by trim/build.

ford_fiesta_job_note_e986904559.text: Use only where push-button start is physically confirmed. KeyStation explicitly lists the Fiesta-compatible 433 MHz ID63 80-bit HU101 keyless family.

ford_fiesta_2017_2023_support.title: Fiesta (2017) owner manuals and vehicle support pages
scope: Ford UK identifies the generation as Fiesta (2017)
owner manuals are published for later model years including 2022

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
